content: AI calendar generators hallucinate platform-specific constraints: wrong character limits, deprecated TikTok caption lengths, Instagram carousel post counts, YouTube Shorts duration limits. Platform policies change faster than model training cutoffs. Key risk: AI suggests features that no longer exist (e.g. Twitter/X algorithm changes, TikTok posting time best practices from 2022 treated as current). Prevention: hard-code current limits in the system prompt as ground truth; treat AI output as draft content only, never as authoritative platform guidance.
